package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinRouteRegistrationAnonymousFunctionOveruse() string {
    ruleID := "gin_route_registration_anonymous_function_overuse"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Route registration that uses many inline anonymous handlers instead of named handler methods or functions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
